sources.name: Livepeer documentation index
sources.summary: Public documentation index used to discover current Livepeer docs before deeper source inspection.
review_notes: Use as a discovery index, not as final proof for volatile claims.

sources.name: Livepeer AI API
sources.summary: Managed and self-hosted API surface for AI generation and transformation operations.
review_notes: Do not claim an endpoint is usable until a current primary source and a live QA call support it.

sources.name: Livepeer AI Gateway and gateway capabilities
sources.summary: Gateway path for routing AI jobs to advertised orchestrator capabilities.
review_notes: Separate gateway responsibility from orchestrator responsibility in app plans.

sources.name: Livepeer open AI infrastructure stack
sources.summary: Conceptual source for how AI workers, runners, gateway routing, ComfyStream, and BYOC-style capability paths fit together.
review_notes: Use this to frame new capability work, then verify implementation requirements from more specific docs.
